name_en: M14239 White Cherry Blossom 🍒(M81911) This Wallet On Chain lvy bag continues the 2000s personality narrative, joyfully joining the x Takashi Murakami replica series. Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vivid colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the kawaii power in the mind of this Japanese artist. Leather shoulder strap and chain for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm. (Excludes doll)
